title: neobolusia tysonii
intro: Neobolusia tysonii, also known as Tyson's spike thistle, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Neobolusia tysonii include its ability to inhibit microbial growth and its antifungal properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoid compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential use in treating infections and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Neobolusia tysonii is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, although its specific preparations and dosages may vary depending on the intended use and cultural context.
